message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "tuple" as T
participant "Upper layer" as U
participant "IP Layer" as IP
participant "IPv4 Inetface" as IPv4
participant "ARP" as ARP
participant "Lower layer" as L

T -- U : IPv4.dst = 192.0.2.1

U -> IP : IPdata
IP -> IP : Allocate IPv4 header
IP -- IP : dst = 192.0.2.1
IP -- T : IPv4.oif = ifp1
IP -- T : IPv4.gw = 198.51.100.1
IP -- T : IPv4.src = 198.51.100.2
IPv4 -- IPv4 : gw = 198.51.100.1
IPv4 -- ARP : mac = 00:00:0e:00:00:01
ARP -- IPv4 : (implicit)
IPv4 -- L : Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01
L -- IPv4 : (implicit)

IP -- IPv4 : Routing table
IP -- IPv4 : IPv4 layer
IP -- IPv4 : IPv4 interface
IP -- ARP : (implicit)
@enduml
